# Clean up signatures for disease-drug comparison
# Created date: 06/13/25
# Author: Kewalin Samart

```{r sourcing functions}
library(here)
source(here("scripts/01_signature_landmark_prep_functions.R"))
```

```{r getting L1000 genes}
L1000genes = getL1000() 
head(L1000genes)
```

```{r reading in a signature and clean it up}
GSE139871_GPL10558_signature = read_tsv(here("data/microarray_TBsignatures/up/GSE139871_GPL10558_MTB_control_up_landmark.tsv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
prepare_signature(signature = GSE139871_GPL10558_signature,
                  L1000 = FALSE)
prepare_signature(signature = GSE139871_GPL10558_signature,
                  L1000 = TRUE)
```
